detail.description:
Grow flowers on mobile and receive real ones!

The one and only emotional healing experience chosen by Lee Min-jung—Korea's No. 1 flower brand, 'Kukka,' delivers the flowers you grow in the game!

Welcome to [Flower of the Day], a healing garden that will make your daily life bloom!

▶ Receive! Real Bouquets!

Bring the flowers you carefully cultivated in the game to your home!

Enjoy the special benefit of having beautiful real bouquets and flower baskets delivered directly to your home.

▶ Wel
